name: Interior Only
description:
We’ll hand-clean the inside of your windows using professional tools and techniques. It’s more than just wiping glass — we remove buildup, smudges, and grime for a clean, streak-free finish.

What we do:
• Hand clean interior window glass with a streak-free, residue-free solution
• Use super-fine steel wool to remove stuck-on grime
• Finish with a professional squeegee for crystal-clear results
• Move furniture or items as needed — if anything is fragile or valuable, we ask that it be moved ahead of time

Why it’s worth it:
• Brightens rooms by letting in more natural light
• Removes fingerprints, smudges, and dust buildup
• Keeps your windows looking well maintained and cared for

What’s not included:
• Hard-water stain removal
• Excessive paint, adhesive, or heavy stuck-on debris (unless quoted separately)
• Track or screen cleaning (available as separate services)

Just so you know:
Pricing depends on window count, accessibility, and layout. Add-ons are available upon request.

name: Patio Concrete Cleaning
description:
We’ll pressure wash your patio to remove dirt, grime, moss, algae, and years of buildup. Whether it’s concrete, pavers, or another hard surface, we’ll get it looking cleaner and safer.

What we do:
• Pressure wash the full patio area
• Apply a cleaning solution to break down organic growth and grime
• Rinse thoroughly to lift and clear buildup
• Focus on shaded or high-traffic areas where dirt and moss collect
• Move outdoor items as needed — if something is fragile or valuable, we ask that it be moved ahead of time

Why it’s worth it:
• Makes your patio look clean and more inviting
• Removes slippery moss and algae
• Helps protect your surface by keeping buildup from setting in

What’s not included:
• Oil stain removal — they typically improve, but won’t fully disappear
• Cleaning of walls, patio furniture, or decorative items not part of the surface

Just so you know:
Priced per square foot, the extent of organic growth and how much chemical is needed.

name: Tile Roof Moss Treatment
description:
We’ll apply a tile-safe moss killer that treats moss, algae, and lichen without scraping or pressure washing. The growth dies and weathers off over time.

What we do:
• Light blow-off of loose roof debris (if accessible)
• Apply moss treatment at the proper strength for tile
• Focus on shaded valleys, north sides, and heavy growth areas
• No scraping or pressure washing of tile
• Flush the gutters of all debris
• Rinse plants to make sure no overspray contaminates them

Why it’s worth it:
• Helps prevent moisture from sitting under moss and causing leaks
• Lowers fire risk by eliminating dry moss over time
• Helps keep gutters from clogging with moss chunks
• Supports insurance requirements to remove visible roof moss

What’s not included:
• Rinse-off/physical removal in the same visit
• Gutter cleaning or repairs
• Roof tile/underlayment repairs

Just so you know:
Priced per square foot of roof area. Moss browns in 1–3 weeks and sheds gradually over several weeks/months. Environmentally compliant application; runoff is managed.

name: Solar Panel Cleaning
description:
Dust, pollen, and especially bird droppings can block sunlight and even cause hot spots that damage your panels over time. We’ll safely clean your solar system so it keeps producing at its best.

What we do:
• Rinse panels with purified water for a spot-free finish
• Use solar panel–specific brushes to remove stuck-on debris
• Check for obvious cracks, shading issues, or anything unusual on the surface
• Look underneath for signs of nesting or chewed wiring from birds or pests

Why it’s worth it:
• Improves efficiency by letting more sunlight through
• Removes bird droppings that can etch glass and shorten panel lifespan
• Helps prevent hot spots and costly long-term damage
• Recommended 1–2 times a year, especially near trees or heavy bird activity

What’s not included:
• Bird proofing (available as a separate service)
• Repairs to damaged panels, wiring, or roofing materials

Just so you know:
We don’t use pressure washers or harsh chemicals — only solar-approved tools and methods. Pricing depends on system size, layout, and roof access.

name: Concrete Stain Removal
description:
We’ll treat specific spots on your concrete to reduce or completely remove stains like oil, rust, grease, or other stubborn buildup. This is a focused service meant to improve problem areas — and in many cases, the stains may be fully removed.

name: Solar Panel Bird Proofing
description:
Birds love nesting under solar panels, but the droppings and debris they leave behind can cause serious problems — from chewed wires to lower energy output. Even worse, bird waste carries bacteria and parasites that can be harmful to your health. We’ll safely secure your system with protective barriers to keep birds and pests out for good.

What we do:
• Inspect panels and roof edges for nesting activity or damage
• Clean out droppings and debris around the perimeter
• Install a protective mesh barrier around your solar array
• Secure everything without drilling into or damaging your panels

Why it’s worth it:
• Stops birds from nesting under your panels and making a mess
• Protects wiring, shingles, and panels from costly damage
• Helps maintain maximum energy production by keeping airflow clear
• Reduces exposure to bird waste, which can be unsafe for your health
• Long-term, low-maintenance solution

What’s not included:
• Full panel cleaning (available separately or bundled)
• Repairs to already damaged wiring or roofing materials
• Removal of active nests during restricted wildlife periods (we’ll advise if that applies)

Just so you know:
Pricing depends on system size, roof access, and layout. This service can be paired with solar panel cleaning for the best results.

name: Window Screen Replacement
description:
If your window screens are torn, brittle, or no longer doing their job, we can replace just the mesh without needing to replace the whole frame. Choose from a range of mesh types to match your needs and budget.

What we do:
• Remove the damaged screen from the frame
• Replace with new mesh, cut and fitted to size
• Secure with new spline and reinstall in the existing frame
• Check for a clean, tight fit before returning the screen to you

Why it’s worth it:
• Restores screen function without replacing the frame
• Keeps bugs and debris out while allowing airflow
• Helps your windows look clean and maintained
• Choose from standard, pet-resistant, or solar mesh options

What’s not included:
• Frame repairs or replacement (this service covers mesh only)
• Screens that are bent, warped, or damaged beyond repair

Just so you know:
We install several mesh types including standard, pet-resistant, and solar screen. Let us know what you're looking for and we’ll help you pick the right fit.
Pricing depends on mesh type, screen size, and how many screens you need done.

name: Window & Door Lubrication
description:
We’ll lubricate the tracks, hinges, and moving parts of your windows and sliding doors to help them open and close more easily. It’s a quick service that makes a big difference in day-to-day use.

What we do:
• Apply silicone-based lubricant to window tracks and sliding door rails
• Treat hinges, rollers, and other moving parts where accessible
• Wipe away excess buildup or dust that may be causing drag
• Check for signs of sticking, squeaking, or uneven movement

Why it’s worth it:
• Makes windows and doors easier to operate
• Reduces wear and tear on rollers, hinges, and tracks
• Helps prevent sticking or jamming, especially in older frames
• Quick, affordable maintenance that extends the life of your hardware

What’s not included:
• Repairs to broken parts, locks, or rollers
• Deep cleaning of tracks or debris removal (available separately)
• Service on items that are sealed shut or non-functional

Just so you know:
This service pairs well with interior window cleaning or screen service. Pricing depends on how many windows or doors need attention and accessibility.

name: Downspout Clearing
description:
If your gutters are fine but the downspouts aren’t draining properly, we can clear out the blockage and get things flowing again. This is a focused service for downspouts only.

• Use hand tools, hose flush, or other methods to clear the blockage
• Confirm water flows freely through the full downspout

• Helps protect siding, foundations, and landscaping
• Fast, low-cost fix for isolated flow issues
• Can save you from needing a full gutter cleaning if that’s not the problem

• Repairs to damaged or disconnected downspouts

name: General Estimate
description:
You let us know the area that needs attention — whether it’s gutters, windows, solar panels, or something else — and we’ll come take a look. We’ll check the condition, explain your options, and give you a clear estimate. In some cases, we may be able to take care of the job during the same visit, depending on time, scope, and materials needed.

What we do:
• Walk the property with you (or independently, if preferred)
• Inspect the area(s) of concern and explain available service options
• Offer add-on suggestions if we see anything worth flagging
• Provide a quote — either on-site or shortly after
• Perform same-day service if time, prep, and materials allow

Why it’s worth it:
• Gives you a clear understanding of what needs to be done
• Saves you a second appointment if we’re able to take care of things right then
• Honest, no-pressure recommendations based on what we see
• Great option for seasonal maintenance or property prep

What’s not included:
• Full written reports for real estate or insurance purposes
• Interior walkthroughs unless scheduled in advance
• Guaranteed same-day service — depends on scope and prep

Just so you know:
Estimates are always free and based on the real condition of your property. If we’ve worked together before, we’ll refer back to your service history when recommending anything new.

name: Roof Blowoff
description:
We’ll remove loose debris like leaves, pine needles, and branches from your roof to help prevent clogs, buildup, and early wear. It’s a smart seasonal service, especially before or after storms.

• Use a leaf blower to clear loose debris from the roof surface
• Focus on valleys, overhangs, and debris-prone areas
• Clear out any debris that’s gathered around vents or flashing
• Do a quick visual check for any noticeable roof concerns

Why it’s worth it:

• Reduces roof wear from moisture-trapping debris

name: Gutter Guard Installation
description:
We install durable metal micro-mesh guards that keep leaves and pine needles out while letting water flow through.

Pricing depends on square footage, siding type, and level of buildup.

name: Second Story Exterior Window Film Application (Customer Supplied)
description:
We’ll install your exterior-rated reflective film on a second-story window from the outside with a trim gap and a proper silicone edge seal.

What we do:
• Prep and clean the exterior glass to film-ready condition
• Wet-apply your film, align, and precision-trim (1–2 mm perimeter gap)
• Hard-squeegee and detail edges; leave written cure/aftercare
• Return in 24–72 hours to apply a neutral-cure silicone edge seal once the perimeter is dry

Why it’s worth it:
• Cuts glare and solar heat before it reaches the glass
• Daytime privacy with a uniform mirror look from outside
• UV reduction to help minimize interior fading

What’s not included:
• Interior window cleaning
• Removal of old film/adhesive, hard-water stain removal, or scratch repair
• Interior-only/“flip” installs of exterior-rated film
• Textured/wired/specialty-coated glass, skylights, or panes needing special rigging beyond ladder/roof access

Just so you know:
• Curing look: New film can appear hazy/bubbly while moisture evaporates—expect 1–3 weeks depending on weather. No cleaning for 30 days.
• Privacy: Reflective films provide daytime privacy only; at night (lights on) privacy reverses.
• Keep it dry: After we seal, keep water off the seal for 24 hours; avoid washing/sprinklers for 72 hours. Full cure is typically 24–48 hours.
• Do not open the window for at least 24 hours after the edge seal is applied.
• Sprinklers: If wind can blow sprinkler mist to this window, turn them off for 72 hours after sealing.
• Thermal stress: Dark/reflective films raise glass temperature; on some dual-pane/low-E units with shade lines or edge chips, crack risk increases.
• Weather: Exterior installs require calm, dry conditions; wind or rain may require rescheduling.
• Warranty: Customer-supplied material = labor-only workmanship warranty (no warranty on the film, glass, or seals).

Prep before we arrive:
• Confirm the film is exterior-rated and not creased
• Clear ground area below the window; move vehicles/outdoor items; secure pets/kids

Aftercare basics:
• Don’t touch film edges; let midday sun help curing
• First clean after 30 days with a soft cloth and a non-ammonia cleaner (optional)

• Remove debris from under and around the array
• Hand-clear packed areas where we can safely reach
• Clean up the ground the best we can

Why it’s worth it:
• Lowers buildup that can trap moisture
• Helps reduce clogging around the array
• Cuts down on debris sitting against the roof
• Gives you a cleaner area around the panels

What’s not included:
• Full solar panel cleaning
• Bird proofing or mesh installation
• Roof repairs or roof cleaning
• Electrical work or panel detachment
• Removal of debris we can’t safely reach without disassembly

Just so you know:
Priced per panel. Final price depends on panel count, roof access, and how much debris is packed under the array. We use a leaf blower and blow as much of the debris that we can from under the solar panels.

name: Asphalt Roof Moss Treatment
description:
Treat moss growth on asphalt shingle roofing using a low-pressure roof-safe application. This service is for asphalt roofs only and is intended to address organic growth without using high-pressure washing.

What we do:
• Inspect the roof surface for visible moss growth and treatment needs
• Apply moss treatment to affected asphalt shingle areas
• Use a low-pressure application method suited for asphalt roofing
• Treat organic growth with the goal of stopping further moss activity
• Note visible roof condition issues that may affect service results

Why it’s worth it:
• Slows ongoing moss growth that can hold moisture against the roof
• Helps reduce further buildup in shaded or damp areas
• Lowers the need for harsher cleaning methods on asphalt shingles
• Supports ongoing roof maintenance between larger services or repairs

What’s not included:
• Manual scraping, brushing, or physical moss removal unless listed separately
• Gutter cleaning or removal of roof debris from gutters and downspouts
• Roof repairs, shingle replacement, or leak diagnosis
• Treatment of tile, metal, cedar, or other non-asphalt roofing
• Cleanup of heavy moss falloff from landscaping or surrounding areas unless listed separately

Just so you know:
Pricing is typically based on roof size, moss severity, access, and how much of the roof needs treatment. Moss usually dies first and releases gradually over time, so the roof may not look fully cleared immediately after service.

name: Roof Treatment Courtesy Follow-Up
description:
Return after service to check treatment progress and confirm the roof is responding as expected. This visit is a visual follow-up for previously treated roof areas.

What we do:
• Reinspect previously treated roof areas from the ground or accessible vantage points
• Check visible moss condition and treatment progress
• Look for areas where moss remains heavy or progress appears uneven
• Document visible results with notes or photos when needed
• Recommend next steps if additional treatment or related service appears needed

Why it’s worth it:
• Helps confirm the treatment is progressing normally
• Catches areas that may need more attention before they become a bigger issue
• Gives the customer a clear update after enough time has passed
• Creates a cleaner handoff between the original service and any next recommendation

What’s not included:
• New roof treatment beyond the original approved scope
• Roof repairs, leak diagnosis, or shingle replacement
• Full roof cleaning or removal of newly fallen debris
• Gutter cleaning or cleanup of roof runoff debris
• Walking fragile or unsafe roof sections unless separately approved

Just so you know:
Pricing is per follow-up visit unless included with the original service. This is a visual courtesy check about one month after treatment, not a guarantee that all moss will be fully gone by that date.**
